subject: Cannot login after password reset
description: I have been unable to login since yesterday morning after being forced to reset my password. The reset email arrived but entering the new password gives an invalid credentials error.

subject: Invoice shows wrong amount for March
description: My invoice for March shows a charge of $299 but I am on the $199 plan. Please review and issue a corrected invoice or refund the difference.

subject: App crashes on startup after latest update
description: The mobile app crashes immediately on launch after the latest update. It worked fine on version 3.1.2. Device is iPhone 15 running iOS 17.4.

subject: Two-factor authentication not working
description: My 2FA codes from the authenticator app are always rejected. I have tried regenerating the secret and syncing my phone clock but the issue persists.

subject: Feature request: dark mode
description: It would be great to have a dark mode option in the settings. Many users in our organisation work in low-light environments and would benefit from this.

subject: Payment declined despite valid card
description: My credit card payment keeps failing with error code CARD_DECLINED even though my bank confirms there are no blocks on the card and sufficient funds are available.

subject: Production outage: all API calls returning 503
description: Our entire production environment is down. All API calls return 503 Service Unavailable. This is causing significant revenue loss and needs immediate escalation.

subject: Refund not processed after 15 days
description: I was promised a refund on 15 April and it has now been 15 days with no credit to my account. Order reference RF-2026-0415.

subject: Bug: notifications sent to wrong user
description: My colleague received email notifications for tickets assigned to me. This is a privacy concern. Steps to reproduce: assign a ticket to me and observe that the notification goes to a different user.

subject: Critical security vulnerability: ticket ID enumeration
description: I discovered that it is possible to view other users tickets by incrementing the ticket ID in the URL. This is a critical security issue that must be fixed immediately to prevent data leakage.

subject: Account locked after failed logins
description: My account got locked after several failed login attempts. I know my password is correct. Please unlock the account and clarify the lockout threshold and duration.

subject: Slow dashboard loading since Tuesday deployment
description: The main dashboard takes over 30 seconds to load since the Tuesday deployment. All other pages load normally. This is blocking our team from their daily workflow.

subject: Feature request: webhook support for real-time events
description: Please add webhook support so we can receive real-time events when tickets are created updated or resolved. This is essential for our workflow automation pipeline.

subject: Subscription auto-renewed without notice
description: My annual subscription was auto-renewed and I was charged $1200 without any renewal reminder email being sent. I would like to cancel and request a full refund under your 30-day guarantee.

subject: API key stopped working — integrations broken
description: My API key stopped working two days ago. I have regenerated it three times but every call returns 401 Unauthorized. Our production integrations are completely broken and we are losing data.

subject: Request: audit log for compliance
description: We need a detailed audit log showing who changed what and when. This is a hard requirement for our ISO 27001 certification renewal in Q3. The log should be exportable as CSV.

subject: GDPR data deletion request
description: Under GDPR Article 17 I am formally requesting the deletion of all personal data associated with my account within 30 days. Please confirm receipt and provide a timeline.

subject: Bug in date filter — results outside selected range
description: When I set a custom date range the results include tickets outside that range. Reproduction steps: go to tickets list, set date from 2026-01-01 to 2026-01-31, observe February dates in results.

subject: Duplicate charges on my account
description: I see two identical charges of $149 on my account statement dated 2026-04-01. I only have one active subscription. Please investigate and refund the duplicate charge.

subject: Request: SLA tracking and breach alerts
description: We need SLA tracking so we can see which tickets have breached their response time targets and receive alerts when a ticket is approaching its SLA deadline. This is critical for our support team KPIs.
